name: lighttpd-mod-openssl
title: lighttpd-mod-openssl
summary: TLS support using OpenSSL module for lighttpd
description:
TLS support using OpenSSL module for lighttpd
This package contains the openssl module for lighttpd. With this module, it is
possible serve https:// URLs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use lighttpd-mod-openssl because TLS support using OpenSSL module for lighttpd.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use lighttpd-mod-openssl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair lighttpd-mod-openssl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `lighttpd-mod-openssl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
